citation: Hal R. Varian (1997), How to Build an Economic Model in Your Spare Time, The American Economist 41(2):3-10
copyright_policy: Only citation, functional analysis, and a remote-byte hash are stored. No source prose is retained or exposed to writers.
derived_function: The essay treats an economic model as an answer to a concrete question and emphasizes simple benchmark cases before generalization; the transferable lesson is research and exposition function, not sentences or author voice.
